meaning: adj.鍠锋按浜曠殑,鑷祦浜曠殑
examples: Sometime the term artesian is used to denote a confined aquifer.
Sometime the term artesian is used to denote a confined aquifer .
No combined exploitation of paretic water and artesian water already polluted may be permitted.
Artesian Resources Corp. shares are currently trading off about 0.4% on the day.
Once a gray-ish, functional agricultural exchange, now artesian cheeses share shelf space with organic produce and local arts and crafts.
